sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106301" key="u(datoqre/mmwn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑδᾰτο-θρέμμων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, gen. <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ονος</itype>, <sense id="n106301.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nurtured and living in water,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἰχθῦς</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:21:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:23:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23.7</biblScope> </bibl> [with <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῡ</itype>, in dact. verse].</sense> </entryFree>
